conversations.description: List of conversations to render in the sidebar.

activeId.description: ID of the currently active conversation; highlighted in the list.

onSelect.description: Fires when a conversation row is clicked.

onSearch.description: Fires when the search input changes. Internal filtering still runs in addition to this.

onPin.description: Fires when an item is pinned/unpinned (consumer-triggered actions).

onArchive.description: Fires when an item is archived/unarchived.

onDelete.description: Fires when an item is deleted.

searchable.description: Show the built-in search input above the list.

sidebarWidth.description: Initial width of the sidebar panel.

hideArchived.description: Filter archived conversations out of the visible list.

emptyState.description: Content rendered when no conversations match.

children.description: Right-side content. Typically a <ChatWindow /> for the active conversation.

className.description: Extra class on the root container.

style.description: Extra inline styles on the root container.

title.description: Optional title shown above the search input.
